message:
🐛 Fix compliance framework test failures blocking release (#9688)

RegisterRoutes only registered POST /evaluate but not GET / and
GET /:id. Tests call RegisterRoutes expecting GET endpoints to work.

Add GET routes to RegisterRoutes so tests pass and authenticated
callers also have access to the read endpoints. The public
(unauthenticated) routes registered via RegisterPublicRoutes remain
unchanged.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
